items.title: Imports, exports and module graph: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this JavaScript: Language and Browser Applications misconception? A module may have several default exports with different names.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. A module has at most one default export; use named exports for multiple explicit interface members.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. A module has at most one default export; use named exports for multiple explicit interface members.

criteria.description: Selects the source-linked JavaScript: Language and Browser Applications correction rather than the documented misconception.
